new_questions.question: [97.119(a)] Which of the following is required when making on-the-air test transmissions?

new_questions.correct_text: An identifier used by DMR to organize radio traffic so that those who want to hear the group aren’t bothered by other radio traffic

new_questions.question: Which of the following requires certification by a civil defense agency?
Which of these frequencies travels at the highest velocity in free space?
new_questions.correct_text: All radio frequencies travel at the same velocity

new_questions.question: How does an ohmmeter measure the resistance of a circuit or component?
new_questions.correct_text: By applying a small current and measuring the resulting voltage

removed_questions.correct_text: A digital mode capable of low signal-to-noise operation

removed_questions.question: What is an advantage of a 5/8 wavelength whip antenna for VHF or UHF mobile service?
removed_questions.correct_text: It has more gain than a 1/4-wavelength antenna

answer_changed.question: [97.407(a)] Besides an FCC-issued amateur operator license, what is required to be the control operator of a Radio Amateur Civil Emergency Service (RACES) Station?
answer_changed.old_answer: D: All these choices are correct
answer_changed.new_answer: C: Certification of current enrollment by a civil defense organization

answer_changed.question: [97.113(d), 97.201(e)] Which of the following is an example of an auxiliary station?
answer_changed.old_answer: D: Repeater, auxiliary, or space stations
answer_changed.new_answer: A: A station sending one-way transmissions between a remote repeater receiver and the main repeater transmitter

answer_changed.question: What is an effective way to seek a call from any phone station when not using a repeater?
answer_changed.new_answer: D: Repeat “CQ” a few times, followed by “this is,” and your call sign, then pause to listen; repeat as necessary

answer_changed.old_answer: B: Store it in a memory channel

answer_changed.new_answer: D: All these choices are correct
